protocol: per-question: each question is evaluated against its own multi-session haystack (~476 sessions); a hit is when a relevant session is in the top-K retrieved.
retrieval: hybrid: vector + FTS5 + lexical fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion; context-window embedding; no reranker; no LLM
tuning: none; never tuned on test. Headline figures are un-reranked.
hardware: AWS EC2 c7i.2xlarge (8 vCPU, 15 GiB), Amazon Linux 2023
notes: Pure local retrieval, no API keys and no network at query time. Reproduce with benchmarks/ harness: convert mteb/LongMemEval multi_session into per-scene normalized datasets, then run memryzed-bench over each scene and aggregate recall@K weighted by question count.
